headline: Palo Alto Networks Expands AI Security With Koi Deal And AES Launch
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) has completed its acquisition of AI security company Koi. The company introduced a new product category, Agentic Endpoint Security (AES), focused on protecting AI powered software on enterprise endpoints. The AES launch is intended to help enterprises identify and remediate risks in their AI software ecosystem. Palo Alto Networks, a large player in network and cloud security, is using the Koi acquisition to expand deeper into protection for AI driven...
